data.body:
Shoppers ramble down a narrow side street off La Rambla in Barcelona. 

I was reacting to the everyday rhythm. The light is even and restrained, colors warm and lived-in, keeping the intimacy of the scene. 

It fits in a hallway, study, or breakfast nook. 

See it here: buff.ly/DOKRL2R 

#blueskyart

data.body: The farming practices are way different than in the 1960's when I was farming with my step-dad. He was into crop rotation and giving some acres a rest called summer fallow. One kind of weed killer was used on the fields that needed it in the spring after the grain started growing.
